contentType.title: Content Type
contentType.description: Choose the type of content you want to publish

post.label: Post
post.description: Text with images for social networks

video.label: Video
video.description: Video upload with thumbnails and metadata

step1.title: Select Social Network
step1.description: Choose which social network to publish to
step1.youtubeDesc: Upload videos with full YouTube Studio metadata
step1.youtubeRecommended: We recommend starting with YouTube as it's the only fully functional platform at the moment.

step2.title: Select YouTube Channels
step2.description: Choose which channel(s) to upload the video to
step2.channelWarning: Warning: Uploading the same video to multiple channels is not recommended. YouTube may limit the reach of identical videos without notice, potentially harming all channels involved.

step3.title: Storage Mode
step3.description: Choose how the video will be stored during processing
step3.localDescription: The video will be processed directly from your computer. No storage fees and the file stays on your device until upload.
step3.localRecommended: Recommended — only available option at this time
step3.cloudDescription: The video would be uploaded to our servers before publishing. This option will be available soon.
step3.cloudUnavailable: Unavailable — cloud storage requires infrastructure upgrade

step4.title: Video Details
step4.description: Configure all your video information just like YouTube Studio
step4.dropzone: Drag & drop video file here, or click to select
step4.fileRequired: Select a video file to continue
step4.fileTooLargeForPlatforms: File exceeds the {limit} limit compatible with selected platforms
step4.textVideoPlaceholder: Enter your video description (shared across platforms)
step4.textRequired: Add text or images to continue
step4.thumbnailUploaded: The thumbnail selected above will be used. You can customize after publishing in YouTube Studio.
step4.title: Title
step4.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe your video (URLs, links, important information)
step4.thumbnailHint: Thumbnail is auto-generated. You can customize it later in YouTube Studio.
step4.tagsHint: Add tags to help viewers discover your video
step4.madeForKids: Is this video made for children?
step4.madeForKidsNo: No, it's not made for kids
step4.madeForKidsHint: This setting affects available features and COPPA compliance
step4.aiGenerated: Does this video contain AI-generated or AI-modified content?
step4.aiGeneratedHint: You must disclose if content was created or altered by generative AI
step4.paidPromotion: Does this video contain paid promotion?
step4.paidPromotionHint: Inform if you received compensation for promoting a product or service
step4.monetizationTitle: Is this video eligible for monetization?
step4.monetizationHint: YouTube will verify if the video meets monetization guidelines
step4.guidelinesHint: Check if this video falls under any restricted category
step4.educational: Educational, documentary, scientific or artistic content
step4.cardsHint: You can add cards and end screens in YouTube Studio after publishing
step4.scheduleHint: If you schedule and leave, the upload will process when you return
step4.scheduleWarning: If you schedule and close the browser, the video will be uploaded when you return and are logged in. Processing is local.

step5.title: Processing
step5.queuedDescription: Your video is in the queue and will be processed when you're available. Keep this tab open during upload.
step5.waitingForYou: Waiting for you to come online...
step5.completeDescription: Your video has been uploaded to YouTube. Visit YouTube Studio for more editing options.
step5.errorDescription: An error occurred while processing your video. Please try again.

videoUploader.title: Upload Video
videoUploader.dropzone: Drag & drop video file here, or click to select
videoUploader.selectPlatformFirst: Select at least one platform to see requirements
videoUploader.unsupportedType: Unsupported file type. Please upload a video file.

platformLimit.title: Platform Requirements
platformLimit.selectPlatform: Select target platforms to see upload requirements

storageMode.title: Storage Mode
storageMode.cloudDescription: Video stored on server for multi-platform publishing. Subject to storage fees.
storageMode.localDescription: Upload directly to a single platform. No storage fees.
